description: A broad cache purge invalidates hot objects everywhere at once with no origin shield, stampeding the origin.
body: Failure mode: a full-zone or wildcard purge drops popular objects from every PoP simultaneously, and with no shield each PoP refetches from origin, overloading it. Detection signals: origin request spike right after a purge; elevated origin latency/errors; purge scope wider than the changed content. Do not wildcard-purge hot content without protection. Safer fallback: purge by surrogate key for only changed objects, use soft-purge (serve stale while revalidating), and enable origin shield/tiered caching to coalesce refetches.
